# Let's open the file to analyze.
import os, sys, json, textwrap, re, unicodedata

# List /mnt/data
import glob, pathlib, codecs

glob.glob('/mnt/data/*')

text = text  # using the previously read content
# Find indices of double quotes
quote_positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
quote_positions, len(quote_positions)

segments = []
# Pair first 2 pairs:
segments.append((quote_positions[0]+1, quote_positions[1], text[quote_positions[0]+1:quote_positions[1]]))
segments.append((quote_positions[2]+1, quote_positions[3], text[quote_positions[2]+1:quote_positions[3]]))
segments.append((quote_positions[4]+1, len(text), text[quote_positions[4]+1:]))
segments

for start, end, s in segments:
    snippet = text[start-2:start] + '[' + text[start:end] + ']' + text[end:end+2]
    print(start, end, len(s))
    print(snippet)
    print('---')

def context(i, j, width=80):
    start = max(0, i - width)
    end = min(len(text), j + width)
    return text[start:i] + '[' + text[i:j] + ']' + text[j:end]

print(context(111,198, 80))
print('---')
print(context(249,335, 80))
print('---')
print(context(399, len(text), 80))
